description: Final steelman analysis and evidence synthesis figure with confidence assessment for each line of evidence
code:
# Final comprehensive steelman analysis and evidence synthesis
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(16, 14))

# Panel A: Steelman vs. Refutation Analysis
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.axis('off')
ax1.set_title('Steelman Analysis: Could GO:0017099 Be Justified for ACAD9?',
              fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Create a two-column comparison
steelman_data = [
    ['Argument FOR GO:0017099', 'Counter-argument', 'Verdict'],
    ['1. ACAD9 has activity on C22:6-CoA\n(DHA), which has 22 carbons',
     'C22 = 22 carbons = LONG-CHAIN by GO\ndefinition (C13-22). GO:0017099 requires\n>22 carbons. Also DHA is polyunsaturated.',
     'FAILS\nC22 is NOT\nvery-long-chain'],
    ['2. ACAD9 is 42% identical to VLCAD,\nwhich has GO:0017099',
     'Homology alone doesn\'t justify IDA.\nSubstrate specificity diverged: different\nEC numbers, different peak substrates.',
     'FAILS\nParalog\nconfusion'],
    ['3. Perhaps PMID:33320993 has\nsupplementary VLC assay data not\nin the abstract',
     'Abstract describes cryo-EM + biophysics\nof MCIA complex. No mention of substrate\nassays. Paper focus is CI assembly.',
     'UNLIKELY\nPaper focus\nis structural'],
    ['4. ACAD9 channel is more open than\nMCAD, so might fit VLC substrates',
     'Channel has Thr-139 (not Gly) at key\nposition. More open than MCAD but still\nrestricted vs VLCAD. No C24 data exists.',
     'FAILS\nPartially\nrestricted'],
    ['5. FlyBase made IDA annotation in\nNov 2025; may reflect expert judgment',
     'Annotation has no extensions or notes.\nBoth cited papers are CI assembly studies.\nIDA evidence code requires direct assay.',
     'QUESTIONABLE\nLikely\nmisannotation'],
]

colors = [['#BBDEFB', '#BBDEFB', '#BBDEFB']]
for i in range(1, 6):
    colors.append(['#FFF9C4', '#E8F5E9', '#FFCDD2'])

table = ax1.table(cellText=steelman_data, cellLoc='center', loc='center',
                  cellColours=colors)
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8.5)
table.scale(1, 3.2)

for j in range(3):
    table[0, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold')
for i in range(1, 6):
    table[i, 2].set_text_props(fontweight='bold', color='#C62828')

# Panel B: Final verdict with confidence assessment
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.axis('off')
ax2.set_title('Final Evidence Synthesis: ACAD9 GO:0017099 Over-Annotation',
              fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Evidence strength meter
evidence_items = [
    ('Enzymatic assays\n(PMID:16020546, 12359260)', 0.95, '#2196F3',
     'Peak at C16:1-C18:1. No >C22 sat. tested.'),
    ('Structural analysis\n(PMID:18227065 + alignment)', 0.85, '#4CAF50',
     'Thr-139/Ala-143 partially restrict channel.'),
    ('EC number assignment\n(UniProt expert curation)', 0.90, '#FF9800',
     'EC 1.3.8.8 (long-chain), NOT 1.3.8.9.'),
    ('Reference audit\n(PMID:33320993, 34646991)', 0.95, '#F44336',
     'Papers study CI assembly, not substrates.'),
    ('In vivo metabolites\n(PMID:24158852)', 0.85, '#9C27B0',
     'Produces C12-C14:1 from LC substrates.'),
    ('Clinical phenotype\n(PMID:30025539)', 0.70, '#607D8B',
     'CI deficiency pattern, not VLC-FAO.'),
    ('GO term definition\n(QuickGO)', 0.98, '#00BCD4',
     'Requires >22 carbons. ACAD9 max = C22.'),
]

y_positions = np.linspace(0.88, 0.08, len(evidence_items))
for i, (label, strength, color, note) in enumerate(evidence_items):
    y = y_positions[i]
    # Bar
    ax2.barh(y, strength, height=0.08, color=color, alpha=0.8,
             transform=ax2.transAxes, zorder=5)
    ax2.barh(y, 1.0, height=0.08, color='#E0E0E0', alpha=0.3,
             transform=ax2.transAxes, zorder=4)
    # Label
    ax2.text(-0.02, y, label, fontsize=9, ha='right', va='center',
             transform=ax2.transAxes, fontweight='bold', color=color)
    # Strength value
    ax2.text(strength + 0.01, y, f'{strength:.0%}', fontsize=9,
             ha='left', va='center', transform=ax2.transAxes,
             fontweight='bold')
    # Note
    ax2.text(0.55, y, note, fontsize=8, ha='left', va='center',
             transform=ax2.transAxes, color='#555555')

# Overall verdict
ax2.text(0.5, -0.05, 
         'OVERALL VERDICT: OVER-ANNOTATED (High Confidence)\n'
         'Recommended action: Remove GO:0017099 IDA; retain GO:0004466 IDA',
         fontsize=12, ha='center', va='top', transform=ax2.transAxes,
         fontweight='bold', color='#C62828',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#FFEBEE', edgecolor='#C62828'))

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0.15, 0.05, 1, 0.97])
plt.savefig('acad9_final_synthesis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Saved: acad9_final_synthesis.png")
